name: shortcuts-playground
description: Build, validate, sign, archive, and remix macOS/iOS Shortcuts from Codex using a bundled Shortcuts plist knowledge base and validator.

interface.longDescription: Create, remix, validate, archive, and sign macOS/iOS Shortcuts plist XML from Codex. Includes ToolKit v63 action metadata, target-gated macOS/iOS 27 ToolKit v78 coverage, reviewed static Apple-derived OS 27 grounding, parameter, enum, and trigger metadata, HealthKit syntax, golden XML examples, icon/color resolution, and validator scripts.
defaultPrompt: Build a shortcut that asks for a city, gets the current weather, and shows a notification.
Remix this unsigned Shortcuts XML to add a confirmation alert before it runs.
